artists.name: The Beatles
artists.fun_fact: The Beatles hold the record for the most number-one hits on the US Billboard Hot 100 with 20.

artists.name: The Rolling Stones
artists.fun_fact: Despite being in their 80s, The Rolling Stones continue to sell out stadiums worldwide.

artists.name: Led Zeppelin
artists.fun_fact: Stairway to Heaven was never released as a single, yet became the most-requested song in radio history.

artists.name: Pink Floyd
songs: Another Brick in the Wall, Pt. 2
artists.fun_fact: The Dark Side of the Moon spent an astonishing 937 weeks on the Billboard 200 chart.

artists.name: Queen
artists.fun_fact: Bohemian Rhapsody was considered too long for radio play but became one of the best-selling singles of all time.

artists.name: David Bowie
artists.fun_fact: Bowie had two different-colored eyes from a schoolyard fight at age 15 that permanently dilated his left pupil.

artists.name: Fleetwood Mac
artists.fun_fact: Rumours was recorded while all four core members were simultaneously going through breakups with each other.

artists.name: Eagles
artists.fun_fact: Hotel California's iconic dual guitar solo was reportedly performed live on the very first take.

artists.name: The Police
songs: Don't Stand So Close to Me

artists.name: U2
songs: Where the Streets Have No Name
artists.fun_fact: Bono is the only person ever nominated for a Grammy, Oscar, Golden Globe, and Nobel Peace Prize.

artists.name: AC/DC
artists.fun_fact: AC/DC's Back in Black is the second best-selling album of all time, behind only Thriller.

artists.name: Bob Dylan
artists.fun_fact: Bob Dylan is the only rock musician to have won the Nobel Prize in Literature, awarded in 2016.

artists.name: Nirvana
artists.fun_fact: Kurt Cobain was left-handed and played guitar left-handed, but wrote and drew right-handed.

artists.name: Oasis
artists.fun_fact: Liam and Noel Gallagher haven't spoken since their bitter on-stage split in Paris in 2009.

artists.name: Radiohead
artists.fun_fact: Radiohead titled OK Computer after a hitchhiker's line in Douglas Adams' The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy.

artists.name: Green Day
artists.fun_fact: Green Day wrote American Idiot after their previous album's master recordings were stolen from a studio.

artists.name: Foo Fighters
artists.fun_fact: Dave Grohl played every single instrument on the Foo Fighters' entire debut album entirely by himself.

artists.name: Coldplay
artists.fun_fact: Coldplay was originally called Starfish before changing their name in 1998.

artists.name: Gorillaz
artists.fun_fact: Gorillaz holds the Guinness World Record as the most commercially successful virtual band of all time.

artists.name: Tame Impala
songs: The Less I Know the Better
Feels Like We Only Go Backwards

artists.name: Imagine Dragons
artists.fun_fact: Imagine Dragons is the most-streamed rock band in Spotify history.

artists.name: Metallica
artists.fun_fact: Metallica is the only band to have performed on all 7 continents, including a concert in Antarctica in 2013.

artists.name: Guns N' Roses
artists.fun_fact: Appetite for Destruction is the best-selling debut album of all time in the United States.

artists.name: Linkin Park
artists.fun_fact: Linkin Park's debut Hybrid Theory was rejected by every major label before eventually being signed.

artists.name: Black Sabbath
artists.fun_fact: Tony Iommi lost the fingertips of two fingers in a factory accident and learned to play anyway, defining heavy metal.

artists.name: Michael Jackson
artists.fun_fact: Michael Jackson's Thriller is the best-selling album of all time with over 66 million copies sold.

artists.name: Madonna
artists.fun_fact: Madonna holds the record for the highest-grossing concert tour by a solo female artist.

artists.name: Whitney Houston
songs: I Wanna Dance with Somebody (Who Loves Me)

artists.name: Mariah Carey
songs: All I Want for Christmas Is You

artists.name: Cyndi Lauper
songs: Girls Just Want to Have Fun

artists.name: ABBA
artists.fun_fact: ABBA was reportedly offered $1 billion to reunite for a world tour in 2000, but turned it down.

artists.name: Taylor Swift
artists.fun_fact: Taylor Swift re-recorded her first 6 albums to reclaim full ownership of her masters after a dispute.

artists.name: Rihanna
artists.fun_fact: Rihanna performed the Super Bowl LVII Halftime Show while reportedly pregnant with her second child.

artists.name: Beyoncé
songs: Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)
artists.fun_fact: Beyoncé became the most Grammy-awarded artist in history, surpassing 32 total wins.

artists.name: Adele
artists.fun_fact: Adele's album 21 was the best-selling album of both 2011 and 2012 worldwide.

artists.name: Eminem
artists.fun_fact: Eminem memorizes the dictionary to find new rhyming combinations and has one of hip-hop's largest vocabularies.

artists.name: Kanye West
artists.fun_fact: Kanye recorded his debut single with his jaw wired shut after a near-fatal car accident in 2002.

artists.name: Drake
artists.fun_fact: Drake appeared as wheelchair-bound Jimmy Brooks on the Canadian teen drama Degrassi before becoming a rapper.

artists.name: Aretha Franklin
songs: (You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman

artists.name: Bob Marley
artists.fun_fact: Bob Marley's Legend is the best-selling reggae album of all time with over 28 million copies sold.

artists.name: Amy Winehouse
artists.fun_fact: Amy Winehouse won 5 Grammy Awards in a single night in 2008 — the most ever by a British female artist.

artists.name: Daft Punk
artists.fun_fact: Daft Punk never appeared publicly without their robot helmets after adopting the personas in 1999.

artists.name: Depeche Mode
artists.fun_fact: Depeche Mode has sold over 100 million records, making them one of the most successful electronic acts ever.

artists.name: Calvin Harris
songs: This Is What You Came For

artists.name: Shania Twain
songs: Man! I Feel Like a Woman!

artists.name: Willie Nelson
songs: Blue Eyes Crying in the Rain

artists.name: Shakira
artists.fun_fact: Shakira speaks 6 languages fluently: Spanish, English, Italian, Portuguese, Arabic, and French.

artists.name: Bad Bunny
artists.fun_fact: Bad Bunny was Spotify's most-streamed artist 3 years running (2020, 2021, 2022).

artists.name: Slipknot
artists.fun_fact: Slipknot has 9 members and each member is traditionally known by a number (0 through 8).

artists.name: The Who
artists.fun_fact: Pete Townshend invented the guitar smash after accidentally breaking his guitar on a low ceiling at a show.

artists.name: The Supremes
songs: Stop! In the Name of Love

artists.name: James Brown
songs: Papa's Got a Brand New Bag

artists.name: Otis Redding
songs: (Sittin' On) The Dock of the Bay

artists.name: Billy Joel
songs: It's Still Rock and Roll to Me

artists.name: The Clash
songs: Should I Stay or Should I Go

artists.name: Creedence Clearwater Revival
songs: Have You Ever Seen the Rain

artists.name: Aerosmith
artists.fun_fact: Aerosmith is the highest-grossing American rock band of all time, earning over $1 billion in touring revenue.

artists.name: Foreigner
songs: I Want to Know What Love Is

artists.name: The Cure
artists.fun_fact: Robert Smith has worn the same smeared red lipstick and black eyeliner on stage for over 40 years.

artists.name: Tears for Fears
songs: Everybody Wants to Rule the World

artists.name: Tina Turner
songs: What's Love Got to Do with It

artists.name: A-ha
songs: The Sun Always Shines on T.V.

artists.name: Wham!
songs: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go

artists.name: Culture Club
songs: Do You Really Want to Hurt Me

artists.name: Van Halen
artists.fun_fact: Eddie Van Halen revolutionized rock guitar with his two-handed tapping technique showcased on 'Eruption.'

artists.name: The Smiths
songs: There Is a Light That Never Goes Out

artists.name: Beastie Boys
songs: (You Gotta) Fight for Your Right (To Party)
artists.fun_fact: The Beastie Boys were originally a hardcore punk band before pivoting to hip-hop in 1983.

artists.name: Run-DMC
artists.fun_fact: Run-DMC's 'Walk This Way' collaboration with Aerosmith is credited with bringing hip-hop to mainstream rock audiences.

artists.name: Backstreet Boys
songs: As Long as You Love Me

artists.name: Pearl Jam
artists.fun_fact: Pearl Jam fought Ticketmaster in 1994 over service fees and testified before the US Congress about it.

artists.name: John Mayer
songs: Slow Dancing in a Burning Room

artists.name: The White Stripes
songs: Fell in Love with a Girl

artists.name: Death Cab for Cutie
songs: I Will Follow You into the Dark

artists.name: BTS
artists.fun_fact: BTS is the first K-pop group to address the United Nations General Assembly, speaking in 2021.

artists.name: Bastille
songs: Things We Lost in the Fire

artists.name: Cage the Elephant
songs: Ain't No Rest for the Wicked

artists.name: The Script
songs: The Man Who Can't Be Moved

artists.name: Pantera
artists.fun_fact: Pantera's guitarist Dimebag Darrell was tragically shot and killed on stage in Columbus, Ohio, in 2004.

artists.name: System of a Down
artists.fun_fact: All four members of System of a Down are of Armenian descent and advocate for Armenian recognition.

artists.name: Rammstein
artists.fun_fact: Rammstein's name references the 1988 Ramstein Air Base airshow disaster in Germany.

artists.name: Moby
songs: We Are All Made of Stars

artists.name: אריק איינשטיין
artists.fun_fact: Arik Einstein is considered the greatest and most beloved Israeli rock artist of all time.

artists.name: שלמה ארצי
artists.fun_fact: Shlomo Artzi has sold more concert tickets in Israel than any other artist in history.

artists.name: כוורת
artists.fun_fact: Kaveret (The Beehive) is considered Israel's most iconic rock band of the 1970s.

artists.name: שלום חנוך
artists.fun_fact: Shalom Hanoch was the first Israeli artist to incorporate electric rock into mainstream Israeli music.

artists.name: יהודית רביץ
artists.fun_fact: Yehudit Ravitz is one of the most successful and influential female artists in Israeli pop history.

artists.name: מתי כספי
artists.fun_fact: Matti Caspi is known for his sophisticated harmonic arrangements and is considered one of Israel's greatest musical composers.

artists.name: חוה אלברשטיין
artists.fun_fact: Chava Alberstein has recorded over 50 albums and is known as Israel's greatest folk and protest singer.

artists.name: אהוד בנאי
artists.fun_fact: Ehud Banai comes from one of Israel's most famous musical families and is known for his poetic rock lyrics.

artists.name: גידי גוב
artists.fun_fact: Gidi Gov was a founding member of Kaveret and later became one of Israel's most beloved solo performers.

artists.name: יהורם גאון
artists.fun_fact: Yehoram Gaon is famous for his role in the Israeli musical film Kazablan and is an icon of classic Israeli entertainment.

artists.name: עברי לידר
artists.fun_fact: Ivri Lider was one of the first Israeli celebrities to publicly come out as gay, becoming an LGBTQ icon.

artists.name: אביב גפן
artists.fun_fact: Aviv Geffen sang 'Shir LaShalom' at the peace rally where Prime Minister Yitzhak Rabin was assassinated in 1995.

artists.name: ריטה
artists.fun_fact: Rita is one of Israel's most successful pop artists and is also known for her albums of Persian/Mizrahi music.

artists.name: דנה אינטרנשיונל
artists.fun_fact: Dana International won the 1998 Eurovision Song Contest with 'Diva', becoming an LGBTQ icon worldwide.

artists.name: משינה
artists.fun_fact: Mashina was one of Israel's biggest rock bands of the late 1980s and 1990s with a gritty urban sound.

artists.name: אתניקס
artists.fun_fact: Ethnix was one of the defining Israeli bands of the 1980s, blending pop and rock with Hebrew lyrics.

artists.name: כנסיית השכל
artists.fun_fact: Knesiyat HaSekhel is considered one of Israel's most important alternative rock bands with deeply philosophical lyrics.

artists.name: היהודים
artists.fun_fact: HaYehudim were known for their energetic live shows and became one of Israel's biggest bands of the 1990s.

artists.name: טיפקס
artists.fun_fact: Tipex blended ska, reggae, and rock into a uniquely Israeli sound and are known for energetic high-energy performances.

artists.name: שב"ק ס'
artists.fun_fact: Shabak Samech pioneered Israeli punk and alternative rock in the 1990s.

artists.name: מוניקה סקס
artists.fun_fact: Monica Sex were a provocative Israeli alternative rock band known for their frank and urban lyrics.

artists.name: זהבה בן
artists.fun_fact: Zehava Ben bridged Mizrahi music and mainstream Israeli pop and became one of the top-selling Israeli artists.

artists.name: שרית חדד
artists.fun_fact: Sarit Hadad represented Israel in Eurovision 2002 and has sold millions of albums in Israel.

artists.name: קובי פרץ
artists.fun_fact: Kobi Peretz is one of Israel's biggest Mizrahi pop stars, with a devoted fanbase across generations.

artists.name: עידן רייכל
artists.fun_fact: Idan Raichel's project combines Israeli, Ethiopian, and world music, and has performed at Carnegie Hall.

artists.name: נועה קירל
artists.fun_fact: Noa Kirel represented Israel at Eurovision 2023 with 'Unicorn' and finished 3rd place.

artists.name: אומר אדם
artists.fun_fact: Omer Adam is one of the most-streamed Israeli artists on Spotify and has broken multiple records in Israel.

artists.name: עדן בן זקן
artists.fun_fact: Eden Ben Zaken broke Israel's Spotify streaming record and became the most-streamed Israeli female artist.

artists.name: סטטיק ובן אל תבורי
artists.fun_fact: Static & Ben El Tavori are the most internationally recognized Israeli pop duo, with hits in multiple languages.

artists.name: ישי ריבו
artists.fun_fact: Ishay Ribo is a religious singer whose music bridges the gap between traditional Jewish themes and contemporary pop.
